top_stories.title: ServiceNow discloses security incident exposing customer data
top_stories.summary: ServiceNow disclosed a security incident in which attackers exploited an unauthenticated access vulnerability through an API endpoint to query data from customer instances. The breach involved unauthorized access to customer data, raising concerns for organizations using ServiceNow for identity governance and IT service management workflows.

top_stories.title: Threat actors are recruiting the people who hold cloud logins
top_stories.summary: Intel 471 published research tracking cybercriminal recruitment of cloud credential holders as insider threats through 2026, categorizing insider risk into three types: negligent, manipulated, and malicious. The report focuses on how threat actors target employees with cloud platform logins, directly implicating credential and access management practices in cloud-reliant organizations.

top_stories.title: ServiceNow Flaw Exploited to Gain Unauthorized Access to Customer Instances
top_stories.summary: ServiceNow applied an emergency security update on June 5, 2026, after threat actors exploited a flaw to gain unauthorized access to hosted customer instances. The vulnerability allowed unauthenticated users to obtain deeper access to susceptible instances, with the company issuing an advisory to affected customers.

top_stories.title: Linx Security Launches Agentic Access Control to Deliver Real-Time Governance Over AI Agents
top_stories.summary: Linx Security has announced the general availability of Linx Agentic Access Control, a real-time enforcement layer for governing AI agent identities within enterprise environments. The product targets security and identity teams seeking governance controls over non-human/AI agent access, positioning within the emerging agentic identity management space.

top_stories.title: Silverfort Integrates AI Agent Identity Control for Microsoft Copilot Studio
top_stories.summary: Silverfort announced an integration with Microsoft Copilot Studio to provide runtime identity and access controls for AI agents. The integration aims to secure agentic AI workloads by applying identity governance and access management controls to AI agents operating within Copilot Studio environments.

news.title: Oracle PeopleSoft servers hacked in ShinyHunters data theft attacks
news.summary: The ShinyHunters extortion gang is actively targeting Oracle PeopleSoft servers in data theft attacks, claiming to have stolen data from over 100 organizations. PeopleSoft is an enterprise platform commonly used for HR and identity-related data, making it relevant to access management and identity governance environments.

news.title: The 5 Best Practices for Secure Identity Verification
news.summary: Specops Software has published guidance outlining five best practices for secure identity verification. The piece addresses attack vectors including phishing, MFA fatigue, and service desk social engineering as threats to authentication systems.

news.title: Identity theft is turning into a chain reaction for victims
news.summary: The Identity Theft Resource Center's 2026 Trends in Identity Report found that more than one in four of the 6,188 individuals who sought help between April 2025 and March 2026 experienced multiple identity-related incidents. The report highlights a pattern of compounding identity crimes affecting victims over time.

news.title: Hades PyPI Attack: 19 Packages Poisoned to Auto-Run Bun Credential Stealer
news.summary: A supply chain attack called Hades has deployed 37 malicious wheel artifacts across 19 PyPI packages designed to steal credentials. The attack uses auto-executing .pth files to run a Bun-based credential stealer, representing an evolution of the earlier Miasma supply chain campaign.

news.title: SailPoint shares fall despite earnings beat and raised guidance
news.summary: SailPoint shares dropped more than 11% despite the identity security company beating analyst expectations on revenue and adjusted earnings while also raising its outlook. The selloff suggests investor expectations were set higher than the reported results.

news.title: Amazon S3 Access Grants are now available in the AWS European Sovereign Cloud (Germany) Region
news.summary: Amazon S3 Access Grants, which map identities from directories like Microsoft Entra ID and AWS IAM to S3 datasets, are now available in the AWS European Sovereign Cloud (Germany) Region. The feature enables organizations to manage access to S3 data using existing identity providers and IAM principals within the sovereign cloud environment.

news.title: What zero-trust data protection means for business
news.summary: The article addresses the limitations of network-level zero trust implementation, arguing that data protection must extend across platforms, applications, and devices. It focuses on applying zero trust principles beyond the network perimeter to where business data actually resides.

news.title: Nimbus-T® Global and Carahsoft Partner to Deliver Identity-First Zero Trust Security to Government Agencies
news.summary: Nimbus-T Global and Carahsoft have entered a partnership to deliver Nimbus-T's identity security platform to U.S. government agencies. The deal positions Carahsoft as a distributor for the Nimbus-Key ID platform, targeting federal zero trust and identity security requirements.

news.title: RevBits and Stony Brook University’s Ethos Lab Establish a Collaborative Partnership to Further the Field of Cyber Security Education and Application
news.summary: RevBits has established a partnership with Stony Brook University's Ethos Lab to provide its cybersecurity solutions for student education. The arrangement gives the lab access to RevBits' full suite of cybersecurity tools to support hands-on training in cyber threat response.

news.title: Infosecurity Europe: Why JLR’s CISO Enforced In-Person Password Resets Following Cyber-Attack
news.summary: Former JLR CISO Ashish Shrestha spoke at Infosecurity Europe about his decision to require over 30,000 employees to reset passwords in person following a cyber-attack. The talk covered the rationale behind enforcing in-person password resets as part of the incident response process.

news.title: 株式会社S-FITの認証基盤統合とセキュリティ強化を支援した事例を公開
news.summary: SoftCreate published a case study about supporting S-FIT Co., Ltd. with authentication infrastructure integration and security enhancement. The article appears to describe an IAM/authentication consolidation project, though specific technical details are limited in the description.

news.title: Top identity and access management risks
news.summary: The article addresses modern IAM risks spanning SaaS applications, AI agents, and machine-to-machine interactions in distributed environments. It covers the expanded scope of identity management beyond traditional system login scenarios.

news.title: UNC3753 Used Vishing and Physical Intrusions in U.S. Data Theft Extortion Campaign
news.summary: Google Mandiant and Google Threat Intelligence Group have attributed a financially motivated data theft extortion campaign targeting U.S. organizations in professional, legal, and financial sectors to threat actor UNC3753, active between January and May 2026. The campaign employed vishing (voice phishing) and physical intrusions as attack vectors against dozens of organizations.

news.title: Silverfort brings runtime identity controls to Microsoft Copilot Studio agents
news.summary: Silverfort launched an integration that applies identity and access controls to AI agents built in Microsoft Copilot Studio, enforcing policy at runtime when an agent attempts to take an action. The integration extends Silverfort's identity security controls to non-human identities in agentic AI workflows, addressing access governance for automated AI actors.

news.title: Coding Gaffe Exposes Microsoft 365 Accounts to Widespread Takeover
news.summary: A coding error in Microsoft 365 Android apps disabled a security setting designed to protect authentication, exposing accounts to potential takeover. The flaw affected key applications including Word, PowerPoint, and Excel, allowing attackers to steal login credentials and data.

news.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
news.summary: Hackers exploited Meta's AI support assistant chatbot to bypass account security and reset passwords, temporarily seizing high-profile Instagram accounts including the Obama White House and a U.S. Space Force official. Instructions for the attack were circulated on Telegram, demonstrating a social engineering vulnerability in AI-driven account recovery and authentication processes.

news.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
news.summary: A CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys and other agency secrets to a public GitHub account, resulting in a data breach that CISA is still working to contain. Lawmakers from both chambers of Congress are demanding answers from CISA as the agency works to invalidate the leaked credentials.

news.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
news.summary: A CISA contractor publicly exposed credentials for multiple highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and numerous internal CISA systems via a public GitHub repository. The leaked repository also contained details about CISA's internal software build, test, and deployment processes.
